meaning: vbl.(resell的过去式及过去分词)再出售,转卖
examples: The materials from e-waste include iron, copper, gold, silver, and aluminum materials that could be reused, resold, salvaged, or recycled.
The disc is undeniably more valuable, since it can be resold.
Recyclers harvest parts from old equipment that can be reused or resold.
Sprint branded products have to be totally unbranded to be resold in North America.
Resold storage products from EMC have all but been replaced by Dell branded systems.
